input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.2.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.2.3.2
            TITLE: all lap belts must incorporate a tilt lock adjuster (“quick adjuster”).

            CONTENT:
            rule T.2.3.2: All Lap Belts must incorporate a tilt lock adjuster (“quick adjuster”).
T.2.3.2 All Lap Belts must incorporate a tilt lock adjuster (“quick adjuster”).   
Lap Belts with “pull-up” adjusters are recommended over “pull-down” adjusters.

final_answer: All Lap Belts must incorporate a tilt lock adjuster (“quick adjuster”). T.2.3.2 All Lap Belts must incorporate a tilt lock adjuster (“quick adjuster”). Lap Belts with “pull-up” adjusters are recommended over “pull-down” adjusters.
